heading: Taxes on failures by hospital organizations
label: 4959 Taxes on failures by hospital organizations
text: If a hospital organization to which section 501(r) applies fails to meet the requirement of section 501(r)(3) for any taxable year, there is imposed on the organization a tax equal to $50,000.
notes: Effective DateSection applicable to failures occurring after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2010 Amendment note under .Mar. 23, 2010section 9007(f)(3) of Pub. L. 111–148section 501 of this title
